overrideReason: Graduating via substantive override after 4 whole-feature govern rounds (findings 18->24->17->15, all triaged; the harmful set fixed RED-first across rounds 1-4; full suite 3505 green + tsc clean as the deterministic floor). Round-4 residual accepted as implementation-altitude and already-captured: 2 compiler-confirmed false-positives (tsc is clean; the compiler is the authority per audit-barrage-is-stochastic-defense-in-depth); 3 folded known-gaps deliberately scoped out (production command delivery+ack wiring TASK-461/464, config plane.url TASK-462/465, ReconnectBackoff healthy-reset wiring TASK-460); 4 weak-test coverage gaps; 3 captured narrow edges (TASK-466 event-log first-file, TASK-467 expiry sweep, TASK-468 history revisioned key); plus the runtime.ts 500-line cap overage from the AUDIT-45 security patch (TASK-469). Operator-approved (fix security+crash-safety, then override) at the diminishing-returns plateau where further rounds surface fresh fix-debt rather than converge.
